meta.title: Field Hospitals | Weatherhaven
meta.description: Fully equipped medical facilities designed to deliver reliable care in remote, austere, or high-pressure environments

hero.title: Field Hospitals
hero.subtitle: Fully equipped medical facilities designed to deliver reliable care in remote, austere, or high-pressure environments

sections.heading: Clinical capability, anywhere on Earth
body: Weatherhaven engineers, manufactures, and installs fully equipped mobile field hospitals from 10 to hundreds of beds.

caption.title: Medical Facilities
caption.body: Level I, II, and III facilities for commercial, military, and emergency response.

items.title: First Aid & Triage Facilities (Level I)
body: Doctor's office equivalent for diagnosing and treating patients.

items.title: Portable Surgical Centres (Level II)
body: Interconnected shelters with controlled staff movement.

items.title: Military Field Hospitals (Level III)
body: Full-scale hospitals for surgery, resuscitation, and post-op care.
Includes kitchens, laundry, and staff housing.

sections.heading: Mobile Medical Care
body: Our Extended Height Mobile Expandable Container Capability adds 4.5 feet of headroom for operating rooms and critical care.

sections.heading: DOWNLOAD OUR RFP GUIDE
sections.body: We deliver complete support for your project or mission with fully turnkey deployable systems. From requirements analysis and system engineering to installation and outfitting, Weatherhaven manages every aspect of your mobile infrastructure.
